name: Domain Trust Discovery
notes:
This rule detects execution of nltest.exe and dsquery.exe for domain trust discovery. This technique is used by attackers to enumerate Active Directory trusts.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Tony Lambert), oscd.community, omkar72
SIGMA Title: Domain Trust Discovery
SIGMA Description: Identifies execution of nltest.exe and dsquery.exe for domain trust discovery. This technique is used by attackers to enumerate Active Directory trusts.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success

when the event matches (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%nltest%' AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%domain_trusts%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%all_trusts%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/trusted_domains%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/dclist%')) OR (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%dsquery%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%trustedDomain%') OR (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%dsquery%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-filter%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%trustedDomain%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Domain Trust Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success

AND when the event matches (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%nltest%' AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%domain_trusts%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%all_trusts%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/trusted_domains%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/dclist%')) OR (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%dsquery%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%trustedDomain%') OR (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%dsquery%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-filter%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%trustedDomain%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects execution of nltest.exe and dsquery.exe for domain trust discovery. This technique is used by attackers to enumerate Active Directory trusts.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
